summary: MoeGo Parity Phase 2 - Smart Booking UI & Notifications Testing Complete. All core features working: Smart booking API with eligibility checks, bath add-on, coupon codes, auto-blocking, and in-app notification system.

minor.issue: Fixed - NotificationResponse model was using enum types instead of strings, causing validation errors with old notification data

ui_bugs.issue: Fixed - SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error

integration_issues.issue: Fixed - NotificationBell was not imported in CustomerDashboard and AdminDashboard headers
Fixed - Import path was '../stores/authStore' instead of '../store/authStore'

critical_code_review_comments: Email and SMS notification channels are MOCKED/STUBBED - only in-app notifications are functional
Bath day selection UI shows 'checkout' or 'day_before' options but the day selector dropdown may need better UX
seed_data_creation: Created test dogs (TEST_SmartDog, TEST_BathDog, TEST_CouponDog) and smart bookings for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features are complete. Smart booking creates bookings with eligibility checks and auto-blocks if vaccination/weight/behavior rules fail. Notifications are sent to both customer (booking status) and admin (approval needed). NotificationBell component is now integrated in both CustomerDashboard and AdminDashboard headers.

smart_booking_api.details: POST /api/moego/bookings/smart creates booking with eligibility checks, bath add-on, coupon code support

bath_addon.details: Bath Before Pickup option with day selection (checkout/day_before) working in UI and API

coupon_code.details: Coupon code input field present in BookStayPage, validated at checkout

auto_blocking.details: Bookings with eligibility failures (missing vaccinations, behavior issues) are auto-blocked with status 'pending_approval'

notification_apis.details: GET /api/moego/notifications, GET /api/moego/notifications/unread-count, POST /api/moego/notifications/{id}/read, POST /api/moego/notifications/mark-all-read all working

notification_bell_ui.details: NotificationBell component renders in header with unread count badge, dropdown shows notifications with 'New' badges

admin_notifications.details: Admin receives 'New Booking Requires Approval' notifications when bookings are auto-blocked

customer_notifications.details: Customer receives 'Booking Requires Review' notification when their booking is auto-blocked

mocked_apis.email_notifications: MOCKED - Framework only, not sending actual emails
mocked_apis.sms_notifications: MOCKED - Framework only, not sending actual SMS
